description:
9 variants, 3 rounds, --print and interactive testing.

**Findings**:
- Prompt can be 57-68% shorter without losing comprehension
- Additive approach ("plan however you want, then materialize") outperforms format override in interactive sessions
- Numbered workflow lists are load-bearing — compressing to prose loses steps
- Comprehension (--print) ≠ behavior (interactive) — always validate interactively

Design doc updated: docs/prompts/prime.md requirements #1, #2, #4, #7, #14.
title: Prime simplification experiment
